title: Backrooms Hide and Seek
description: A small modpack made for my friends and I to play on our custom backrooms map.
body: This is a small modpack I made for my friends and I. As of realease it features, a small lobby area, a seeker timer, and a level 0 inspired hiding area. Spooklimentary is the recommended shader. For the best experience use all of the included resource packs.
